name: Oberoi Realty Limited
summary: Oberoi Realty Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate development and hospitality businesses in India. The company develops residential, commercial, retail and social infrastructure projects. It also leases office and retail spaces. In addition, the company engages in the hotel operations comprising sale of rooms, food and beverages, and allied services; and provision of property management services. Oberoi Realty Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
